title: EWAPerformanceResult
description: Structured output from the Performance specialist agent. Observation-first model: every assigned performance chapter produces at least one observation covering alerts, workload baselines, capacity KPIs, and SAP advisory actions. RAG status is captured when available from EWA flags; expert assessments are used otherwise.

findings.description: Performance observations — one or more entries per assigned chapter/section. Covers alerts (RED/YELLOW), workload baselines, capacity KPIs, and response time assessments. Every assigned section must produce at least one observation, including healthy areas.

source_chapter.description: Chapter and subsection where this observation originates.

title.description: Short descriptive title for this observation (e.g. 'CPU Utilization — Application Servers', 'Dialog Response Time Assessment').

rag_status.description: RAG status: GREEN=healthy, YELLOW=warning/attention, RED=critical. Set to null only when the EWA provides no explicit flag and a narrative assessment is used instead.

finding.description: The observed state — what was measured or detected, whether healthy or problematic. For healthy areas, summarize the positive metrics. For alerts, describe the exact issue with data values.

impact.description: Significance of this observation. For healthy items, note what this means for system performance (e.g. 'Hardware resources are adequate for current workload.'). For flagged items, state the technical risk.

recommendation.description: Required action, if any. Set to null for GREEN observations with no action needed. For YELLOW/RED, quote SAP's advisory if available, or provide expert-level SAP Basis guidance.

parameters.description: Configuration parameters with an explicit SAP-recommended value change.

param_name.description: Name of the SAP parameter or configuration item.

current_value.description: Current value as reported in the EWA.

recommended_value.description: SAP-recommended value as stated in the report.

abstentions.description: Chapters or sections that could not be analyzed due to data quality issues.

reason.description: Reason the section could not be analyzed.
